Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Cross-Complaint And Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Continued To Nov-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT GECH, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Cross-Complaint And Stay Action Pending Arbitration is Continued to November 15, 2017 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185, email:ADelgado@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GECH, INC.'s Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration is Off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. There is no proof of service of summons and complaint on defendant Seth Rosenfeld. Nor has Mr. Rosenfeld appeared in this case. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
